title: StrikeCore Tool I/O Envelope
description: Uniform JSON envelope emitted on stdout by every contract-conformant tool. Carries per-result NATO Admiralty reliability+confidence so scoring propagates end-to-end into the intel pipeline.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of this run.

input.description: Echo of the normalized input the tool acted on.

results.description: Zero or more findings. Each carries its OWN Admiralty reliability+confidence and sources, so the quality gate and analyst can score without re-deriving.

type.description: Finding type (e.g. 'email', 'social_profile', 'validation', 'address'). MUST NOT be a phone type from a non-phone tool (CLAUDE.md §3.4).

reliability.description: NATO Admiralty source reliability for THIS result.

confidence.description: NATO Admiralty information credibility for THIS result.

sources.description: Provenance URLs/identifiers backing this result. Empty array allowed only for deterministic algorithmic results (e.g. checksum validation).

errors.description: Structured error records; empty on full success.

run_id.description: Unique id for this invocation (for audit correlation).

selftest.description: True if this envelope was produced by --selftest (no real targets touched).

target.description: Optional: the real-world target this run pertained to.
